subject: Your Marrow key is live. Start here.
preheader: One command in Claude Code, then let Marrow start learning.
text:
Hi,

Your Marrow API key is live:

`{{api_key}}`

If you're using Claude Code, this is the fastest way to get started:

`npx @getmarrow/mcp setup --api-key {{api_key}}`

That installs Marrow as an MCP server so your agent can start logging decisions and pulling context right away.

You should start seeing meaningful improvement after about 20 decisions or 7 days, whichever comes first. That's when Marrow has enough history to stop guessing and start helping.

Under the hood, your agent also benefits from anonymized patterns across the hive. More usage means better judgment for your setup, and stronger signals for everyone else.

If you're not on Claude Code, you can use the SDK directly, or MCP with Cursor or Windsurf.

Buu, founder

P.S. If setup feels rough anywhere, reply to this. We read those.
html:
One command in Claude Code, then let Marrow start learning.
 
MARROW
Welcome

Your Marrow key is live.

Start with one command, then let the product earn its way into your workflow.

API key
{{api_key}}

If you're using Claude Code, this is the fastest path:

npx @getmarrow/mcp setup --api-key {{api_key}}

That installs Marrow as an MCP server so your agent can start logging decisions and pulling context right away.

You should start seeing meaningful improvement after about 20 decisions or 7 days, whichever comes first. That's when Marrow has enough history to stop guessing and start helping.

Under the hood, your agent also benefits from anonymized patterns across the hive. More usage means better judgment for your setup, and stronger signals for everyone else.

If you're not on Claude Code, you can use the SDK directly, or MCP with Cursor or Windsurf.

Buu, founder

P.S. If setup feels rough anywhere, reply to this. We read those.

Unsubscribe
Marrow · made by Buu and a small team.
